Bob Dylan
5/2/91
Salem Civic Center, Salem, VA

Disc 1:
1-New Morning
2-Lay Lady Lay
3-All Along The Watchtower
4-Ballad Of A Thin Man (Man In Me?)
5-Gotta Serve Somebody
6-Wiggle Wiggle
7-Don't Think Twice, It's Alright
8-Garden Of Eden
9-Mr. Tamborine Man
10-It Ain't Me Babe
11-Everything Is Broken
12-Man In The Long Black Coat
13-Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
14-I Believe In You

Disc 2:
1-I Shall Be Released
2-Like A Rolling Stone
3-Blowin' In The Wind
4-Maggie's Farm
